messages.content: Why does a cool breeze blow over the seashore from the ocean on a sunny day?Answer options with 4 optionsA.because moist air moves fasterB.because of the rotation of EarthC.because a conduction current occursD.because the land is heating up faster than the ocean
D. because the land is heating up faster than the ocean
Cells that are arranged into groups by similar function and structure are calledAnswer options with 5 optionsA.cell groups.B.organs.C.organisms.D.systems.E.tissues.
E. tissues.
Which is an ,begin emphasis,igneous,end emphasis, rock?Answer options with 4 optionsA.basaltB.marbleC.sandstoneD.shale
A. basalt

A container filled with water weighs 15 grams. The container with the water is put into the freezer. The container is taken out and weighed again after it is frozen.What is the weight of the frozen container of water?Answer options with 4 optionsA.10 gramsB.15 gramsC.20 gramsD.30 grams
C. 20 grams
A drop of water can be used to focus light.What phenomena allows water to focus light?Answer options with 4 optionsA.dispersionB.polarizationC.reflectionD.refraction
D. refraction
What effect does uneven heating have on the Earth system?Answer options with 4 optionsA.The tides form.B.The winds develop.C.The air pressure equalizes.D.The water vapor condenses.
B. The winds develop.
What effect does uneven heating have on the Earth system?Answer options with 4 optionsA.The tides form.B.The winds develop.C.The air pressure equalizes.D.The water vapor condenses.
B. The winds develop.
How many neutrons are found in the nucleus of Upper C r? (atomic number 24, atomic mass 52)Answer options with 5 optionsA.24B.28C.48D.52E.76

To find out the number of neutrons in an atom, you subtract the atomic number from the atomic mass. 

Number of neutrons = Atomic mass - Atomic number

In this case, the atomic number is 24 and the atomic mass is 52.

Number of neutrons = 52 - 24 = 28

Therefore, the correct option is B. 28.
When it is high tide on one side of the earth, the opposite side of the earth experiencesAnswer options with 5 optionsA.low tide.B.high tide.C.flood tide.D.ebb tide.E.red tide.
A. low tide

If a city is thought of as a plant cell, which part is the central vacuole?Answer options with 5 optionsA.the factory, where materials are builtB.the city hall, where the information to run the cell is storedC.the power plant, where fuel is burned to release its energyD.the reservoir, where water is storedE.the post office, where materials are labeled and shipped
D. the reservoir, where water is stored

The diagram shows a unicellular organism. It has one nucleus surrounded by a nuclear membrane.The unicellular organism has other structures in its cell, and an irregular, wavy shape.QuestionWhat kingdom does this organism belong to?Answer options with 4 optionsA.AnimalsB.FungiC.PlantsD.Protists
D. Protists

Which change has ,begin emphasis,most,end emphasis, increased the vulnerability of commerce to volcanic eruptions?Answer options with 4 optionsA.The frequency and intensity of volcanic eruptions have increased.B.The pollutants released by volcanic eruptions have become more toxic.C.The overall amount of commerce conducted by air transportation has increased.D.The overall amount of commerce conducted by ground transportation has increased.
C. The overall amount of commerce conducted by air transportation has increased.

Which is the difference between Upper F e and Upper F e superscript 2 plus?Answer options with 4 optionsA.their mass numbersB.their number of protonsC.their number of neutronsD.their number of electrons
D. their number of electrons
